title: Kernel bootstrap lane `verification-review`: stay active for this session as the verification and review lane. For now, do bootstrap-only work: reply with a one-line readiness status and the kinds of verification tasks you can take next. Do not inspect the repository or external systems yet.
summary_text: `verification-review` lane is active and ready; next I can run focused verification on security/correctness/regression risks, missing or weak test coverage, failure-mode and rollback checks, CI/test-plan adequacy, and release-readiness gates (and I will flag any single-lane fallback as a workflow violation).
